title: fragaria recta
intro: Fragaria recta, also known as wild strawberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds and ascorbic acid. The health benefits of Fragaria recta include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Fragaria recta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
